title: carduus macrocephalus subsp. scabrisquamus
intro: Carduus macrocephalus subsp. scabrisquamus, also known as the Rough-headed Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
